name: Fillet of Sole with Tartar Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sole Fillets; Cut To Serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Prepare the Tartar Sauce by mixing all ingredients together and refrigerating.
3. Arrange sole fillets in an ungreased baking dish (8 X 8 X 2-inches) and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Mix butter, lemon juice, and onion; drizzle over fish.
5. Bake, uncovered, for 25 to 30 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
6. Serve with Tartar Sauce.
Microwave Directions:
1. Arrange sole fillets in an ungreased microwavable pie plate (9 X 11/4 inches), sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Mix butter, lemon juice, and onion; drizzle over fish.
3. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 4 to 7 minutes, rotating the dish after 2 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
